description: French trader 'Théo' operated multiple coordinated Polymarket accounts to place ~$30M in bets on Trump winning the 2024 US election, evading per-account size limits. The cluster won ~$85M. First reported by NYT and Bloomberg in November 2024; Chainalysis later identified up to 11 linked accounts.

addresses.notes: Primary account. Ranked #2 all-time profit on Polymarket leaderboard. +$16.6M profit, $76.6M volume.
Ranked #1 all-time profit on Polymarket leaderboard. +$22M profit. 14 bets, only $19 in losses.

addresses.address: TODO: Michie wallet address not independently verified via public sources. Candidate 0xed2239a9150c3920000d0094d28fa51c7db03dd0 appeared in one Polymarket search result but could not be cross-referenced. Verify via Polymarket leaderboard page or PolyTrack cluster detection tool.
addresses.source: WSJ, NYT, Bloomberg reporting confirm Michie as 4th account in the cluster. Ranked #14 all-time profit on Polymarket leaderboard post-election.
addresses.notes: TODO: manually visit polymarket.com/profile/@Michie or polymarket.com/leaderboard to extract the 0x address and confirm.

reference_articles.note: First identified the 4 accounts (Fredi9999, Theo4, PrincessCaro, Michie) as belonging to a single French trader.
Interview with Théo. Confirmed French nationality, finance background, 'shy Trump voter' polling thesis.
Initial profit estimate of $48M from 4 accounts.
Chainalysis identified up to 11 accounts, revised profit estimate to $85M.
Disclosed 9 accounts linked by funding patterns, timing, and exchange cashout addresses.
Updated to 10 confirmed + 1 suspected address. Total profit ~$83.5M confirmed.
